query:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN scoreMatch >= 0.95 THEN '0.95-1.00 (excelente)'
    WHEN scoreMatch >= 0.90 THEN '0.90-0.95 (bom)'
    WHEN scoreMatch >= 0.85 THEN '0.85-0.90 (aceitável)'
    WHEN scoreMatch >= 0.75 THEN '0.75-0.85 (suspeito)'
    ELSE '< 0.75 (provável falso positivo)'
  END as faixa_score,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  ROUND(COUNT(*)*100.0/(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM spread_analysis),1) as pct
FROM spread_analysis
GROUP BY faixa_score
ORDER BY MIN(scoreMatch) DESC;

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN scoreMatch >= 0.95 THEN '0.95-1.00 (excelente)'
    WHEN scoreMatch >= 0.90 THEN '0.90-0.95 (bom)'
    WHEN scoreMatch >= 0.85 THEN '0.85-0.90 (aceitável)'
    WHEN scoreMatch >= 0.75 THEN '0.75-0.85 (suspeito)'
    ELSE '< 0.75 (provável falso positivo)'
  END as faixa_score,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  ROUND(COUNT(*)*100.0/(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM spread_analysis),1) as pct
FROM spread_analysis
GROUP BY faixa_score
ORDER BY MIN(scoreMatch) DESC;
